name: batchor
description: Help researchers and coding agents build durable OpenAI and Gemini Batch workflows with Batchor.

interface.shortDescription: Build resumable LLM batch research pipelines
interface.longDescription: Turns datasets and prompts into durable Batchor CLI or Python workflows, with guidance for structured results, resume-safe sources, storage, run operations, and artifact retention.
defaultPrompt: Turn my CSV and research prompt into a resumable batch job.
Add structured Batchor results to this Python pipeline.
Help me resume and export results from a Batchor run.
